_doc: Note-type templates for auto-creation in Anki. Server substitutes {{LOCALE}} with the BCP-47 TTS locale (e.g. bn_IN, es_MX) at model creation time. Field names and structure are language-agnostic. Vocab has 3 card templates gated by EnableRecognition/EnableProduction/EnableListening fields — populating only the desired flags lets a single note generate 1-3 cards. Cloze and MC-cloze are separate note types copied from existing models (spanish-cloze and Bangla Enhanced Cloze) with field-name normalization and locale substitution only — visual/behavioral redesign is intentionally deferred.
